content.text: Pure DPS caster. Two branches — Conduit (single-target boss-killing) and Storm (AoE horde-clearing). Abilities supplement the pattern system, providing utility, efficiency, and emergency options around the core casting loop. The Channeler is pattern-heavy — abilities support, not define.

Rift Sense (Passive): Detect dimensional anomalies, hidden rift creatures, Toxicity concentrations, and rift-touched objects/creatures within Medium range without a check. Your eyes see what others can't. Additionally, you can identify any pattern being cast by an enemy Channeler (you know what's coming).
T2 — Trained Techniques (300 cr each, 1 downtime)

rows: Your next single-target pattern this turn gets +2 accuracy. Spend AP to guarantee the hit on a critical target.
Your single-target Surge patterns (Rift Bolt, Mind Spike, Siphon, Gravity Crush) apply Rift Burn on hit: 1 rift damage per round for 2 rounds (ignores armor). Small DoT on top of burst.
Your next AoE pattern this turn increases its radius/zone by +10ft. One use per encounter.
Choose up to 2 allies when casting an AoE pattern. Those allies are immune to the pattern's effects. Friendly fire protection for your most-used AoE — but only 2 allies, not the whole squad.
Reduce your Toxicity by 2. Can only use when Toxicity is 10 or below. The only active Toxicity reduction the Channeler gets in combat. Emergency cooldown.
Misfire backlash damage is reduced by your Grit bonus. At Grit 8 (+4 bonus), a Surge misfire deals 2d6−4 instead of 2d6. Doesn't eliminate misfires — just makes them survivable.

content.text: T3 — Advanced Techniques (600 cr each, 2 downtime)

rows: Your single-target patterns can be cast at Long range (instead of Medium) with no penalty. Stay back. Stay alive. Cast from safety.
When your single-target pattern reduces an enemy to 0 HP, immediately recover 1 Toxicity and 1 HP. The kill sustains you. Free action, triggers automatically.

Once per encounter: after casting a Surge-tier single-target pattern, immediately cast it again for 0 AP and 0 Toxicity (still costs nothing — it's an echo). The second cast has -2 accuracy. The rift stutters — same bolt, twice.
After casting an AoE pattern, the zone becomes Scorched for 2 rounds — enemies entering or starting their turn in it take 1d4 rift damage. Your AoE leaves burning ground.
When your AoE pattern kills at least 1 enemy, reduce the Toxicity cost of your next pattern this encounter by 1. Kills fuel efficiency.
When you or an ally within Close range is hit by an attack, reduce the damage by 1d8 + your Interface bonus. +1 Toxicity. Once per round. Your only defensive tool — and it costs Toxicity.

Once per encounter: your next pattern this turn has its damage dice doubled. All costs are also doubled (Toxicity, HP). A Rift Bolt becomes 4d8 for +2 Toxicity. An Annihilation Beam becomes 8d8 for +6 Toxicity and 6 HP. The “I need this thing dead NOW” button.

content.text: T4 — Master Techniques (1,000 cr each, 3 downtime)

rows: Once per encounter: if your single-target pattern hits a target below 25% HP, the damage is automatically maximized (all dice show maximum value). No roll. Guaranteed kill on wounded targets.

When you kill an enemy with a single-target pattern, your next single-target pattern this turn costs 0 AP (still costs Toxicity). Chaining kills. If the first kill was a Surge (2 AP), you just freed 2 AP for another cast.

Once per encounter: cast any AoE Surge or Torrent pattern. It hits the targeted zone AND a second zone within 10ft of the first. Full damage to both zones. Full Toxicity and HP cost. Two blast zones, one action.
Your AoE patterns cannot be interrupted, negated, or reduced by enemy abilities. If an enemy has “magic resistance” or “damage reduction vs rift,” your AoE ignores it. Raw power overrides protection.
When you drop to 0 HP: instead of falling unconscious, immediately cast one Surge-tier pattern for free (0 AP, 0 Toxicity, 0 HP). Then fall unconscious. Your final act is destruction.
